title: html_to_text: constructs new ammonia Builder on every call
description:
LOCATION: src/sanitize.rs:49-53

FINDING: html_to_text() creates a fresh Builder::new(), configures it with an empty HashSet, calls .clean(), and discards the builder — on every call. Compare sanitize_html() which correctly caches its builder in a LazyLock<Builder>.

html_to_text is called on every post for language detection (content.rs:detect_language path in delivery.rs:212), on every card field in fetch_and_store (card.rs:180-182), and potentially on bio rendering. The Builder construction is not free: ammonia 4.x initialises internal hashmaps for tag and attribute allowlists.

IMPACT: Unnecessary Builder allocation per call. Fix: add a second LazyLock<Builder> configured with empty tags, matching the pattern already used by SANITIZE_BUILDER.
close_reason: Fixed: html_to_text uses cached LazyLock Builder
